old_value: {"id":"smallhold-bf6","title":"Shared inbox + per-actor inbox + HTTP signature verification","description":"Implement the ActivityPub inbox endpoints: shared inbox at /inbox and per-actor inbox at /users/:username/inbox. All inbound activities must have their HTTP signatures verified before processing. Use the activitypub-federation crate for signature verification. Fetch the sender's public key from remote_accounts (or resolve if unknown). Reject activities with invalid signatures with 401.","design":"Use activitypub-federation crate's inbox extraction. Verify signature by fetching keyId URL, parsing actor document, extracting publicKey.publicKeyPem. Cache in remote_accounts. On signature failure: re-fetch actor (key may have rotated), retry once, then 401. Parse to/cc to determine which local actors are targeted.","acceptance_criteria":"Inbound POST to /inbox with valid HTTP signature is accepted; invalid signature returns 401; Pleroma Content-Type with charset parameter is accepted; activities arrive in correct JSON structure; shared inbox correctly routes to local actors via to/cc fields","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-22T23:59:30Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-22T23:59:30Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-ryy","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T16:59:45Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
